results.title: Belgium slams EU Commission for inaction against illegal Israeli settlements
results.description: Foreign Minister Maxime Prévot said the EU executive had thrown countries a "bone to chew on" but failed to propose substantial measures on trade with the settlers.

results.title: Colombia star Campaz receives death threats after World Cup miss; revives Escobar memories
results.description: "My Colombia, please let us never lose sight of respect. We may think differently or feel frustration and sadness, but no passion justifies hatred or living in fear," he wrote in Spanish translated to English.
